prompt_text:
### Demographics: 73-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 8 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after ophthalmology referral for suspected retinopathy
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class II)
Body mass index category: Overweight
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Thyroid nodule (status post lobectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older sister)
- Social history: Current smoker (5 cigarettes/day for 5 years; ~1.2 pack-years); Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Sitagliptin 100mg once daily; Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Prednisone (5 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 82.2 kg; Height 182.4 cm; BMI 24.7 kg/m²; Blood pressure 130/78 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.0%; 9 months ago 8.6%; 6 months ago 8.6%; 3 months ago 9.1%; current 9.3%), FPG (12 months ago 218mg/dL; 9 months ago 232mg/dL; 6 months ago 238mg/dL; 3 months ago 193mg/dL; current 221mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 79.1kg; 9 months ago 79.1kg; 6 months ago 79.3kg; 3 months ago 79.7kg; current 82.2kg), Height (12 months ago 182.4cm; 9 months ago 182.4cm; 6 months ago 182.4cm; 3 months ago 182.4cm; current 182.4cm), BMI (12 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 24.0kg/m²; current 24.7kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 129mmHg; 9 months ago 134mmHg; 6 months ago 130mmHg; 3 months ago 129mmHg; current 130mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 77mmHg; 9 months ago 79mmHg; 6 months ago 80mmHg; 3 months ago 77mmHg; current 78mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 25U/L; 9 months ago 26U/L; 6 months ago 25U/L; 3 months ago 26U/L; current 22U/L), AST (12 months ago 21U/L; 9 months ago 28U/L; 6 months ago 29U/L; 3 months ago 22U/L; current 25U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.5mg/dL; current 0.5mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 42mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 43mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 44mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 42mL/min/1.73m²; current 40mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 226mg/g; 9 months ago 178mg/g; 6 months ago 277mg/g; 3 months ago 287mg/g; current 243mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 78mg/dL; 9 months ago 77mg/dL; 6 months ago 78mg/dL; 3 months ago 77mg/dL; current 80mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 41mg/dL; 9 months ago 42mg/dL; 6 months ago 38mg/dL; 3 months ago 38mg/dL; current 40mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 136mg/dL; 9 months ago 141mg/dL; 6 months ago 141mg/dL; 3 months ago 152mg/dL; current 147mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.0g/dL; 6 months ago 13.0g/dL; 3 months ago 12.2g/dL; current 12.1g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
